title: Security Patterns
subtitle: XSS prevention, HTTP interceptors, JWT, CSRF, and Content Security Policy
description: Security in Angular starts with understanding what the framework protects you from automatically (XSS) and what you must handle yourself (CSRF, JWT storage, auth guards). Learn the patterns that keep Angular applications secure.
learningOutcomes: Explain Angular's built-in XSS protection and when/how to safely bypass it
Implement functional HTTP interceptors for auth token injection and 401 retry
Build authentication route guards using the functional canActivate API
Choose safe JWT storage strategies and understand the tradeoffs
Configure CSRF protection with Angular's built-in XSRF handling
Set up Content Security Policy headers compatible with Angular
